title: Welcome to Semester 1
message: Students should visit the Lecture Notes page before every class and bring a notebook for important terms.

title: First Assignment Published
message: Assignment 01 is available on the Assignments page. Submit it before the due date announced in class.

title: Lab Practice Reminder
message: Practice creating folders, renaming files, and saving documents during lab hours.

title: Practice Quiz Available
message: Quiz 01 is available for practice. Marks are not officially recorded.
